article_meta.title: Christmas travelers left stranded as airports see mass flight cancelations

reasoning: Solid identification of several genuine author-prose bias instances with correct attribution handling. One flagged item is somewhat weak, and a couple of clear biased phrasings in the author’s prose were missed.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged phrases come from the author’s own prose; no quoted or attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: The item "mass cancellations and delays" is debatable as sensational given immediate quantitative context; others are defensibly biased.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable author-level bias such as the headline’s "left stranded" and the phrase "barreling through the northeast."
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are generally appropriate; "Spin" vs. "Sensationalism" could be debated on the first item but is within reasonable bounds.
